title: Just Stationery Single Hole Metal Pencil Sharpner
features: Quality material: the silver pencil sharpener adopts carbon steel, and the frame material is aluminum alloy, which is durable and reliable, not easy to break or rust, can serve you for a long time
Portable and practical: these metal pencil sharpeners are light in weight, you can conveniently put them in your bags for easy carrying, and use them whenever you want
Non-slip texture: the side of each manual pencil sharpener is textured, to ensure that your hands do not slip while sharpening, safe for both children and adults to use.

Package includes: you will get 1 piece of metal pencil sharpener in silver color; Sufficient quantity can meet your daily use and replacement, and you can share them with your friends or classmates. Or can be a great party bag filler.
Wide applications: These pencil sharpeners are suitable for both standard and colored pencils, crayons,makeup pencil, etc., can be applied for school use, office, home and art projects.
description: Product Description Just Stationery Single Hole Metal Pencil Sharpner Box Contains 1 pencil sharpener
